title: Sebastian Metz
text:
I am a Bioinformatician with a PhD in Molecular Biology and Biotechnology. Currently, I am working as a Postdoc at the Station Biologique de Roscoff, Roscoff, France. I am interested in microbial Ecology and Evolution (See my Publications for more info). I love to code. Mostly I use R and Python to answer my research questions. I am also interested in web development and database management. Therefore, I like to spend some time learning about these. In my spare time, I like to bike, travel and Run. After having COVID-19 in September 2022, I started a journey to become a runner, training every week with the objective of participating in one marathon from Abbot World Marathon Majors.


National University of San Martín (UNSAM), San Martín | Buenos Aires, Argentina PhD in Molecular Biology and Biotechnology | Apr 2015 - Oct 2020
National University of Entre Ríos (UNER), Oro Verde | Paraná Argentina Licenciado (Similar to MSc) in Bioinformatics | Feb 2010 - Mar 2015



Postdoctoral researcher | Station Biologique de Roscoff | Jan 2022 - present
Postdoctoral researcher | Laboratoire des sciences de l’Environnement Marin | Nov 2020 - Jan 2022

title: Comming soon!
text:
Hi, I just launched the webpage, and I am working on the material, but here is the list of the kind of information I will post on this blog:

Projects that I am working on related to Bioinformatics and Data analysis.
R and Python code that I think can be useful.
Remainders of how to use command lines that I always forgot.
and more!
